impact: src/server/server_net.c (receives and extracts NetMsgStartGame; builds NetPlayerView with turn_time_limit)

change_log.change: Changed client_net_send_start_game() signature from client_net_send_start_game(int ai_difficulty) to client_net_send_start_game(int ai_difficulty, int timer_option, int point_goal_idx, int gamemode)
impact: src/main.c (line 781: call site must pass 4 arguments instead of 1)

change_log.change: Added timer_option, point_goal_idx, gamemode fields to Room struct; added elo_received, elo_prev[4], elo_new[4] for ELO results
impact: src/server/server_net.c (reads room options when broadcasting start game; applies ELO results)
